title: Outcome Contract, Non-Goals, and Measures of Success · Cumulative Product Review
summary: A delayed review reconstructs outcome contract, non-goals, and measures of success from stakeholder, decision, assumption, revision, artifact, observation, changed case, rejected failure, repair, owner, and residual-risk evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for measurable outcome and non-goal contract after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Connect product capability to user behavior, user outcome, stakeholder outcome, and public consequence without assuming causality.
Define a baseline, observable leading and lagging measures, collection method, comparison window, and uncertainty.
Pair success measures with accessibility, equity, privacy, security, reliability, and burden guardrails.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-1 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-1
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Outcome Chain · changed case · Review Outcome Chain
steps.instruction:
review case — A team targets engagement growth without a baseline, causal path, burden guardrail, or threshold for stopping a harmful direction. The review variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

Which action demonstrates Outcome Chain without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Outcome Chain · changed case · Review Outcome Chain.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for connect product capability to user behavior, user outcome, stakeholder outcome, and public consequence without assuming causality. For Outcome Chain · changed case · Review Outcome Chain, keep Outcome Chain connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

steps.title: Record what required effort · Review Stop Pivot Rule
steps.instruction:

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Define evidence thresholds that trigger continue, revise, pause, or stop decisions before sunk cost grows.
